title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SOLEDAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BINALBAGAN, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL TO BARRIO PAYAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3243 / 52 OG No. 6, 2988 (June, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1442, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO SOLEDAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BINALBAGAN, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL TO BARRIO PAYAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Soledad in the Municipality of Binalbagan, Province of Negros Occidental, is hereby changed to Barrio Payao.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 14, 1956.
